display.purpose: Page titles and hero metrics. Rare.

label.purpose: Column headers, nav section labels, stat card labels. The workhorse.

shadows.name: ring
shadows.purpose: Subtle containment border for cards and containers.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Indigo accent button for primary CTAs. Used sparingly.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #5e6ad2; color: #ffffff; padding: 8px 16px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #828fff; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #4752c4; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px color-mix(in oklab, #5e6ad2, transparent 30%), 0 4px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Transparent button with muted text. The default button style.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #8a8f98; padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1), color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04); color: #f7f8f8; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px color-mix(in oklab, #5e6ad2, transparent 30%), 0 4px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); }

components.name: Search Input
components.css: .ds-input { background: transparent; color: #f7f8f8; padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 14px; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); border-radius: 8px; outline: none; width: 100%; transition: border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1), box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #8a8f98; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #5e6ad2; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px color-mix(in oklab, #5e6ad2, transparent 30%), 0 4px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); }

components.name: Nav Item
components.description: Sidebar navigation item with active indicator.
components.html: Dashboard
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 13px; color: #8a8f98; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 6px; transition: color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1), background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1); } .ds-nav-item:hover { color: #f7f8f8; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04); } .ds-nav-item.active { color: #5e6ad2; background: rgba(94, 106, 210, 0.1); font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Stat Card
components.description: Dense metric card with icon badge and large number.
components.html:
GOLD
1.2M
components.css: .ds-stat-card { background: #191a1b; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; transition: border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1); } .ds-stat-card:hover { border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12); } .ds-stat-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; } .ds-stat-badge { width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(234, 179, 8, 0.1); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: #eab308; } .ds-stat-label { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: #62666d; } .ds-stat-value { font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #eab308; }

components.name: Table Row
components.description: Data table row with alternating stripe and selection state.
components.html: account_00112,450 Online
components.css: .ds-table-row { display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 14px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1); } .ds-table-row:hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); } .ds-table-row:nth-child(even) { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.025); } .ds-table-row:nth-child(even):hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06); } .ds-table-row.selected { background: rgba(94, 106, 210, 0.08); } .ds-cell { font-size: 14px; color: rgba(247, 248, 248, 0.9); flex: 1; } .ds-cell-num { font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-cell-status { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; } .ds-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; } .ds-dot-online { background: #27a644; }

narrative.overview: A dimly lit operations room where every pixel carries data and nothing is decorative. The interface IS the mission. Roblox Tracker monitors hundreds of game accounts simultaneously; the design exists to make that surveillance instant, effortless, and unambiguous. The system is dark-native by necessity, not trend. The operator works long sessions scanning dense numeric data. Dark surfaces reduce eye strain; high-contrast text makes numbers pop.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-native with luminance-stepped neutrals, never true black or white
Single accent (indigo-violet) reserved for interactive elements only
Uppercase micro-labels for scannable section headers
Dense grid layouts optimized for simultaneous multi-stat monitoring
Framer Motion for subtle state transitions, no choreography

rules.name: The Reservation Rule
rules.body: Indigo appears on less than 10% of any screen. Active nav indicators, selected checkboxes, focus rings, primary buttons. That's it.

rules.name: The Tinted Neutral Rule
rules.body: No #000 or #fff anywhere. Every neutral carries a faint warm tint.

rules.name: The Label Doctrine
rules.body: Section headers and data labels are always uppercase, 10-11px, semi-bold, with wide letter-spacing (0.1-0.15em).

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. The raised shadow appears only on floating elements (dropdowns, popovers, dialogs).

dos: Do use the label doctrine for every section header and data label
Do pair semantic colors with text labels or icons; never rely on color alone
Do use luminance stepping to create depth without shadows
Do keep the accent under 10% of any screen surface
Do use framer-motion at 150-200ms with ease-standard easing
Do use semi-transparent white overlays (4-8%) for hover states
donts: Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as colored accent stripes
Don't add whitespace for breathing room; information density wins
Don't use hero sections, marketing headlines, or consumer onboarding patterns
Don't use bounce, elastic, or spring animations
